backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing IMU recording metadata and blobs with user/admin access control for create, read, list, and delete operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requirements to affected frontend files and components with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of multiple frontend source files for quick reference in build planning.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes with full token sets for UI and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entrypoint that forces dark mode and loads the React application root and main module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app layout with header, login button, IMU dashboard, and footer attribution; no theme toggle.
frontend/src/features/auth/LoginButton.t: Handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states, error handling, and React Query cache clearing.
frontend/src/features/imu/calibration.ts: Calibration utilities computing and applying gyro bias, magnetometer hard/soft-iron correction, and accelerometer scaling/offset.
frontend/src/features/imu/csvExport.ts: Generates CSV strings from IMU samples and provides a browser download helper.
frontend/src/features/imu/IMUDashboard.t: Full IMU dashboard for live sensor streaming, fusion, calibration workflows, recording, CSV export, and saved-session management.
frontend/src/features/imu/madgwick.ts: Implements the Madgwick sensor fusion algorithm for IMU and MARG quaternion updates.
frontend/src/features/imu/orientation.ts: Converts quaternion values into Euler yaw, pitch, and roll angles.
frontend/src/features/imu/PlotsView.tsx: Empty placeholder file for plotting view.
React hook that starts IMU sensors, tracks availability, timestamps, sample rates, and streams sensor data.
frontend/src/features/recordings/SavedSe: UI for saving, downloading, and deleting IMU recording sessions using CSV export and backend storage.
frontend/src/features/recordings/useReco: React-query hooks for listing, retrieving, saving, and deleting recordings via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages authentication with Internet Identity, exposing identity state, login, logout, and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file indicating queries are defined in feature modules.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and CSS variables for light and dark themes, applying base styles and theme-driven colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and an Internet Identity provider, importing global styles.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading, writing, and clearing URL and sessionStorage parameters with hash-routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom theme colors, containers, animations, and plugins using CSS variable–driven theming.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature tracking, and requirements for enforcing an always-dark UI without a theme toggle.
